_publications._publicationTitle: Influences of RASopathies on Neuroanatomical Variation in Children.

_contextSnippet: Our RASopathies group, along with NS and NF1, demonstrated a lower full-scale IQ score compared to TD (RASopathies vs. TD: p= 2.35e −13 , NS vs. TD: p =3.86e −12 , NF1 vs. TD: p =4.0e −6 )
details: Successfully detected significantly lower full-scale IQ scores in RASopathies vs TD (p=2.35e-13), NS vs TD (p=3.86e-12), and NF1 vs TD (p=4.0e-6). Also detected significantly lower verbal and performance IQ components in all clinical groups compared to TD.
